{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/29586629?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/qerogram", "id": 29586629, "login": "qerogram", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI5NTg2NjI5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/qerogram", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47211", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-426", "name": "Untrusted Search Path"}], "description": "### Impact
A Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability was discovered in Ouroboros. If a user clones a malicious repository and runs Ouroboros commands within that directory, it can lead to arbitrary code execution and potential system takeover.

The vulnerability (CWE-426: Untrusted Search Path & CWE-15: External Control of System Setting) stems from Ouroboros loading the `.env` file from the current working directory. Prior to the patch, execution-affecting environment variables such as `OUROBOROS_CLI_PATH`, `OPENCODE_CLI_PATH`, and other backend selectors were accepted directly from this local `.env`. An attacker could include a malicious script in the repository and point the CLI path variable to it (e.g., `OUROBOROS_CLI_PATH=./malicious_script.sh`). When the user executes a command like `ouroboros init` or any command that instantiates the adapter, the malicious script is executed instead of the intended CLI.

### Patches
The vulnerability has been patched in version 0.39.0 via PR #1078.
The fix establishes a strict trust boundary by applying a denylist to project-local `.env` loading. It blocks execution-affecting environment variables (such as runtime selectors and CLI path overrides) from being loaded from the project directory. Explicit constructor overrides and trusted user-owned home configurations (`~/.ouroboros/.env`) remain fully functional. 

Users are strongly advised to upgrade to version 0.39.0 or later.

### Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, users must carefully inspect any `.env` file inside cloned repositories before running Ouroboros commands to ensure it does not contain unexpected `OUROBOROS_*_CLI_PATH` or `OPENCODE_CLI_PATH` overrides.

### References
- GitHub PR: https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros/pull/1078", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00557, "percentile": 0.68745}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c4m7-2gwp-vw76", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-29T21:22:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c4m7-2gwp-vw76", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c4m7-2gwp-vw76"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47211"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-29T21:22:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros/security/advisories/GHSA-c4m7-2gwp-vw76", "https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros/pull/1078", "https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros/commit/4e70b760b4eb157469b58645339ba831f6513d37", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c4m7-2gwp-vw76"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Q00/ouroboros/security-advisories/GHSA-c4m7-2gwp-vw76", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros", "summary": "ouroboros-ai Vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via Untrusted Project-Directory .env", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-29T21:22:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c4m7-2gwp-vw76", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.39.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ouroboros-ai"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.39.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: ouroboros-ai Vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via Untrusted Project-Directory .env
